title: Tamera Lanham
description: Visiting Scholar — Before joining Forethought, Tamera worked on the alignment team at Anthropic, where she researched chain-of-thought faithfulness and scalable oversight. She has a bachelor’s degree in biochemistry from Temple University.
body:
# Tamera Lanham

**Role:** Visiting Scholar

Before joining Forethought, Tamera worked on the alignment team at Anthropic, where she researched chain-of-thought faithfulness and scalable oversight. She has a bachelor’s degree in biochemistry from Temple University.
